infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Loocbooc needs camera access to scan garments and care labels.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Loocbooc needs microphone access for video recording during garment scans.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Loocbooc needs access to save scan captures to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Loocbooc uses motion sensors to track camera orientation during garment scanning.

plugins.cameraPermission: Loocbooc needs camera access to scan garments and care labels.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Loocbooc to save scan captures.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Loocbooc to save scan captures.
